title: Mount Mulanje for Beginners: Easy Hikes, Waterfalls & First-Timer Tips
meta_title: Mount Mulanje for Beginners: First-Timer Guide 2026
meta_description: Planning Mount Mulanje for beginners? Start with Likabula Falls, try the Chambe day hike, and learn what to pack, expect, and where to stay in Thyolo.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Mount Mulanje doesn't have to mean multi-day expeditions and technical scrambles. This guide covers the easiest entry points — from the 45-minute walk to Likabula Falls to a rewarding Chambe day hike — plus what to bring, how to hire guides, and where to base yourself in comfort.
content:
